overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking along a desert highway on the outskirts of Night City, approaching a billboard with two maintenance workers, and observing the futuristic urban skyline before returning to the road as a van drives away.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: multi-lane black asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
futuristic cityscape with tall glass and neon-lit buildings
tall industrial traffic signal structure with multiple lights
white commercial van parked on the road shoulder
metal guardrail along the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sun-baked desert highway toward the towering skyline of Night City. A white van is parked on the shoulder to the left, and a tall traffic structure rises against the rocky hillside.

events.description: player leaves the asphalt highway and begins ascending the dirt hillside

agents.ego_description: climbing up the desert hillside away from the road toward a billboard structure

entered.detail: sandy and gravelly desert ground with dry grass patches
scattered joshua trees and desert shrubs
large commercial billboard with advertisement showing a woman and text ANNO 2077

segments.scene_description: Leaving the highway, the player ascends a desert hillside covered in dry grass and joshua trees. A large billboard becomes visible in the distance while the city skyline shifts to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: billboard maintenance site on desert hill

events.description: player circles around the two workers to view them from different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing two maintenance workers standing under the billboard, circling around them

notable_agents.action: worker in green safety vest and white hard hat holding a tablet and looking up at the billboard
worker in gray tank top and yellow hard hat holding a tablet and conversing with the other worker

entered.detail: concrete foundation and support structure for the billboard

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the billboard where two maintenance workers in safety gear are inspecting the structure. The camera circles around them, showing the large advertisement and the concrete base, with the city skyline visible in the background.

events.description: the white van drives along the highway and passes by the player

agents.ego_description: walking back down the hillside to the highway and watching the van drive away toward the city

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the highway away from the camera position

entered.detail: multi-lane black asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
white commercial van now driving on the road
metal guardrail along the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the highway as the white van drives past and continues toward the city. The camera follows the van briefly before the clip ends, with the Night City skyline prominent ahead and the desert hillside now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate desert highway toward a towering futuristic skyline. It begins with a walk along a sun-baked road past a parked white van and a tall traffic structure rising against a rocky hillside. As the camera leaves the pavement, the perspective ascends a dry, grassy slope dotted with joshua trees, shifting the city skyline to the right as a large billboard emerges in the distance. The scene then focuses on the billboard's concrete base, circling around two maintenance workers in safety gear before turning back toward the road. Finally, the camera follows the white van as it drives away toward the prominent urban horizon, leaving the desert hillside behind.
